# Safety Concern

## Concern

Describe the safety, reliability, or misuse concern.

## Affected File

List the prompt, guide, template, or documentation file.

## Suggested Mitigation

Describe how the issue could be reduced or clarified.

## Sensitive Information Notice

Do not include private data, credentials, confidential documents, medical records, legal files, or customer information.
